case_title: MIGUEL SALAS VS. CELIA MERCEDES MAACO-QUISPE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR STEINER, PAUL J.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALAS, MIGUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACCO-QUISPE, CELIA MERCEDES $11,180.16 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,180.16, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF PER MEMO TO BE SUBMITTED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100082770)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALAS, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT MAACO-QUISPE, CELIA MERCEDES DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-12-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-11-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-20-2018
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN FRANCIS MARTIN.
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO APR-08-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $1,113.63 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE AUG-05-2019,, (TRANSACTION ID # 100077607) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALAS, MIGUEL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62253833), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALAS, MIGUEL SERVED JUN-25-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUN-27-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT MAACO-QUISPE, CELIA MERCEDES
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-12-2018 CONTINUED TO OCT-24-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-19-2018. THE OCT-24-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 200006385): REYNOLDS, RICHARD LEROY SUBSTITUTED FOR REYNOLDS, RICHARD LEROY AS ATTORNEY FOR SALAS, MIGUEL
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100037190) FILED BY DEFENDANT MACCO-QUISPE, CELIA MERCEDES
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100046519) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALAS, MIGUEL ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE DEC-13-2018.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ARBITRATOR PAUL J. STEINER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-17-2018 THROUGH MAR-17-2019.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALAS, MIGUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACCO-QUISPE, CELIA MERCEDES $11,180.16 PRINCIPAL, $1,113.63 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,293.79, SEE SCANNED DOC

ORDER OF EXAMINATION FEB-06-2020 - DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT LOCAL RULE 8.9E AS TO DEFENDANT CELIA MERCEDES MAACO-QUISPE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO APPEARANCES. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALAS, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT MAACO-QUISPE, CELIA MERCEDES OEX HEARING SET FOR FEB-06-2020 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514
